entities.name: Strength Training Logger
entities.context: Python CLI tool for logging strength training sessions with subcommands and structured data capture

entities.name: RPE Scale
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion (1-10) used to track training intensity

entities.name: Training Phase System
entities.context: Periodization framework with phases like ramp_week1, used to structure training progression

entities.name: Session Types
entities.context: Categorized workout types: upper, lower, core, full_body, mobility

entities.name: Baseline Protocol
entities.context: Reference training protocol against which deviations are tracked via deviation_notes

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database backend used for persisting training session logs (conn.commit/conn.close pattern)

relationships.context: Captures RPE as optional integer parameter per session
Tracks current training phase with default of ramp_week1
Requires session type classification from predefined choices
Persists session data via SQLite connection
Tracks deviations from baseline protocol via deviation-notes field
Phases structure the baseline protocol that sessions are measured against
